@linxiaoyu: person "林小雨"
@pku: org "北大"

$p_name = name(@linxiaoyu, "林小雨")
$p_alias = alias(@linxiaoyu, "小雨")
$p_study = study_at(@linxiaoyu, @pku)
$p_edu = education(@linxiaoyu, "研究生")
$p_skill = skill(@linxiaoyu, "计算机")

@p: literal
note($p, "我会说中文、英语和一点日语。平时喜欢跑步和弹吉他。")
$name_cn: literal
$name_en: literal
$name_jp: literal
@run: literal
@guitar: literal
$speak_cn = speak(@self, "中文")
$speak_en = speak(@self, "英语")
$speak_jp = speak(@self, "日语")
$like_run = like(@self, "跑步")
$like_guitar = like(@self, "弹吉他")

@food: literal "香菜"
$1 = dislike(@self, "吃香菜")
$2 = uncertain(@self, "不会游泳")
$3 = like(@self, "擅长做饭")
note($3, "我很擅长做饭")

@dahuang: animal "大黄"
@g: object
@tuzi: animal "团子"
@manman: animal "慢慢"
@xiaojie: person "小杰"
@gz: place "广州"
@sh: place "上海"
@petshop: org "宠物店"

$name_d = name(@dahuang, "大黄")
$breed_d = like(@dahuang, "金毛")
$age_d = age(@dahuang, 5)
$habit_d = habit(@dahuang, "特别温顺")

$name_t = name(@tuzi, "团子")
$breed_t = like(@tuzi, "英短蓝猫")
$age_t = age(@tuzi, 8)
$habit_t = habit(@tuzi, "很调皮老是抓沙发")

$name_m = name(@manman, "慢慢")
$age_m = age(@manman, 10)

$pet1 = pet(@self, @dahuang)
$pet2 = pet(@self, @tuzi)
$pet3 = pet(@self, @manman)

$buy1 = buy(@xiaojie, "大黄")
$petshop_buy = buy(@self, "大黄")
$source1 = alias(@dahuang, "我男朋友小杰从宠物店买的")
$give1 = alias(@tuzi, "朋友送的")
$own1 = own(@self, @manman)
$move1 = move(@self, @gz, @sh)

@wang: person "老王"
$dog = hobby(@wang, "金毛")
$retract = retract_intent(@self, "老王养了一条金毛")
# nothing to extract

@dad: person "我爸"
@sz: place "深圳"
$1 = resign(@dad, "国企")
$2 = time($1, "三年前")
$3 = start(@dad, "餐厅")
$4 = time($3, "去年")
$5 = move(@self, @sz)
$6 = time($5, "上个月")
